fixSummaryByRootCause.unnecessary_clarification_with_wrong_sur: Clarification routing now treats deictic single-market prompts as single-target requests and promotes exact direct-tool matches instead of broad event-wide fallbacks.
fixSummaryByRootCause.unnecessary_clarification: Clarification routing now preserves strong direct intent matches for event-specific live-volume style prompts instead of defaulting back to generic discovery tools.
fixSummaryByRootCause.shared_runtime_selection_bias: Auto-selecting market-level tools are now classified by their actual entity granularity, so market-scoped workflows no longer compete as if they were event-wide surfaces.

deployment.summary: No contributor deployment was needed because only shared runtime code changed in the Context app for this iteration.

failures: context: pre-existing TS2551/TS2561 errors in app/api/v1/query/route.ts around executionError/executionLogs typing.
